root.title: Draft autosave for the note editor

predictions.approach: Debounced client save -> idempotent PUT -> restore-on-open; one vertical slice per user-visible guarantee.

prd.title: PRD: Draft autosave for the note editor
prd.body_markdown:
## Objective
A user editing a note never loses unsaved work: edits persist automatically and survive a reload or crash.

## Why
Support reports recurring lost-work complaints after accidental tab closes. Manual Ctrl-S is the only persistence path today.

## Constraints
- No new infra; reuse the existing notes store and PUT endpoint.
- Saves must be idempotent (no duplicate-draft rows on retry).
- No regression to the explicit-save path.

## Out of scope
- Multi-device real-time sync / OT-CRDT merge.
- Version history / undo timeline.

## Success definition
A user can edit, reload mid-edit, and resume from the last autosaved state with zero manual action; explicit save still works.

## Chosen approach
Debounce edits client-side (2s idle), PUT a draft keyed by note-id (idempotent upsert), and rehydrate the editor from the latest draft on open. Three vertical slices, each independently verifiable end-to-end.

## Open questions
- Debounce interval (2s assumed) — confirm against typing telemetry.
- Draft retention window before GC.

## Traceability
Ground consulted: codegraph unavailable on this demo corpus -> effort/risk below are tagged UNGROUNDED (no graph). Remediation proposed: `codegraph init -i` on the editor repo before dispatch.

leaves.title: User edits autosave without pressing save

success_criteria.criterion: Edits persist after a 2s idle with no manual save
success_criteria.gradeable_signal: integration test: type, wait 2s, assert a draft PUT fired and store row exists

success_criteria.criterion: Rapid edits do not spam the endpoint
success_criteria.gradeable_signal: test: 10 keystrokes in 1s yields <=1 PUT after debounce

stop_conditions: If the notes PUT endpoint is not idempotent, STOP and report — slice L2 must land first.

predictions.approach: Debounce hook around the editor change event; fire PUT on idle. UNGROUNDED effort — no graph consulted.
predictions.pre_mortem: Most likely failure: debounce races with explicit save and double-writes.

leaves.title: Draft saves are idempotent on retry

success_criteria.criterion: Re-sending the same draft does not create a duplicate row
success_criteria.gradeable_signal: test: PUT same draft twice, assert one row

stop_conditions: If the store has no unique key for (note_id, user_id), STOP and surface a schema decision to the operator.

predictions.approach: Upsert keyed on note_id+user_id. UNGROUNDED effort — no graph consulted.
predictions.pre_mortem: Most likely failure: concurrent autosave + explicit save lost-update.

leaves.title: Editor restores the latest draft on open

success_criteria.criterion: Reopening a note with a newer draft rehydrates the draft, not the saved version
success_criteria.gradeable_signal: e2e: edit, reload, assert editor shows last autosaved text

stop_conditions: If both a draft and a newer explicit save exist, STOP and confirm precedence with the operator before guessing.

predictions.approach: On load, fetch latest draft; if newer than saved, hydrate from draft. UNGROUNDED effort — no graph consulted.
predictions.pre_mortem: Most likely failure: stale draft shadows a legitimate newer explicit save.
